source_text: Correspondence shall be clear, concise, and easily understood.
plain_language_rule: Write correspondence that is clear, concise, and easily understood by the intended audience.

source_text: Each paragraph shall address a single subject.
plain_language_rule: Each paragraph must address only one subject to maintain clarity and focus.

source_text: Use plain language. Avoid jargon, acronyms, and technical terms unless necessary.
plain_language_rule: Use plain language and avoid jargon, acronyms, and technical terms unless they are necessary and well-known to the audience.

source_text: Use correct grammar, spelling, and punctuation.
plain_language_rule: All correspondence must use correct grammar, spelling, and punctuation.
